word: G4926 - συνομιλέω - synomiléō - soon-om-il-eh'-o - Talk with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συνομιλέω

- Transliteration: sunomileo

- Phonetic: soon-om-il-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to talk with

- Origin: from G4862 and G3656

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G3656; to converse mutually: - talk with.
